queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of lacking a formal checking account on consumer credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of reduced credit risk associated with critical or diversified existing credit histories in retail lending portfolios.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: The protective effect of negative checking account balances on borrower default likelihood and credit risk drivers in consumer finance.
